questionHtml: Outline the effect of the cochlear implant on hearing.
markschemeHtml:
a. the implant lowered the threshold of hearing
OR
allowed quieter sounds to be heard;

b. the person would be able to hear human speech;

meta.title: Outline the effect of the cochlear implant on hearing.
